title: Magic link authentication
description: Sign in with a one-time link sent to your email — no password required. Useful for reducing friction on low-security internal tools.

title: CSV export for all admin data tables
description: Export users, audit logs, subscriptions, and webhook deliveries to CSV directly from the admin panel. No manual database queries needed.

title: Billing usage metering (pay-as-you-go add-ons)
description: Track and charge for usage-based features — API calls, seats, storage — as Stripe metered billing items. Add-ons on top of base subscriptions.

title: API Webhooks v2
description: Enhanced webhook system with retry policies, filtering, and delivery logs.

title: Two-Factor Authentication
description: TOTP-based two-factor authentication with recovery codes.
